offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inconsistent invoice formats cause delayed payments. We aggregate and format supplier invoices into standardized reports instead of manual data entry and formatting.
problem: Inconsistent invoice formats lead to delayed payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on invoice management
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Engage in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try basic formatting options and export to CSV on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
